arts.ttl: Lazio President Lotito Reflects on Club’s Legacy and Transfer Activity
arts.sum: In a heartfelt speech during the celebration of Lazio's 125th anniversary, President Claudio Lotito expressed pride in the club's history and the passion of its supporters. The post Lazio President Lotito Reflects on Club’s Legacy and Transfer Activity appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Lotito: ‘Lazio offer over 10m for Fazzini’ rejected by Empoli
arts.sum: Lazio President Claudio Lotito confirms the offer for Empoli midfielder Jacopo Fazzini was ‘over €10m’...

arts.ttl: Como Coach Fabregas Previews Lazio match and Addresses New Signings: “Both Diao and Butez are Available”
arts.sum: As Como prepare for their crucial match against Lazio at the Stadio Olimpico, head coach Cesc Fabregas is optimistic about the team's chances, especially with the recent additions of Assane Diao and Jean Butez. Fabregas expressed his enthusiasm, stating, "Both players will be available for selection, and we are very happy to have them on board." The post Como Coach Fabregas Previews Lazio match and Addresses New Signings: “Both Diao and Butez are Available” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Lazio v Como: Match Preview
arts.sum: Lazio will be aiming to bounce back from a disappointing derby defeat as they host Como at the Stadio Olimpico on Friday evening. The Biancocelesti's recent form has been inconsistent, with just seven points from their last six Serie A matches, while Como have shown signs of improvement in their battle against relegation. The post Serie A | Lazio v Como: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Lazio prepare for 125th anniversary celebration: Ultras call for family-friendly festivities
arts.sum: Lazio are gearing up for a momentous celebration as the club reaches its 125th anniversary. The festivities are set to kick off tonight at Piazza della Libertà, a location steeped in history as the meeting place of the club's founders in 1900. The post Lazio prepare for 125th anniversary celebration: Ultras call for family-friendly festivities appeared first on FootItalia.com.
